title: Cron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cron''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
===Events===
*'''[[Cron Supernova]]''', a legendary [[supernova]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Cron Belt]]''', a location on the far side of the Cron Drift
*'''[[Cron Cluster]]''', a legendary [[star cluster]]
*'''[[Cron Drift]]''', an [[asteroid field]] in the [[Auril sector]]
*'''[[Cronese Mandate]]''', a [[sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]

===Vehicles and vessels===
*'''[[Cronian battlebird]]''', a model of [[warship]] that was part of the [[Citizens' Fleet]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Events===
*'''[[Cron Supernova/Legends|Cron Supernova]]''', a [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] that occurred during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]
*'''[[Cronese Sweeps]]''', a campaign of [[Xer's Campaigns]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Cron Cluster/Legends|Cron Cluster]]''', a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] in the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]]
*'''[[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]]''', an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] in the Auril sector
*'''[[Cron system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the Auril sector
*'''[[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]]''', a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]
*'''[[Greater Cronese Arc]]''', a [[hyperlane]] in the Tion Cluster
*'''[[Lesser Cronese Arc]]''', a hyperlane in the Tion Cluster

===Titles and organizations===
*'''[[Cronese]]''', the people of the Kingdom of Cron
*'''[[Duke of Cron]]''', a [[Tionese (people)|Tionese]] [[Noble/Legends|noble]] title
*'''[[Four Thrones of Cron]]''', a term used during the reign of [[Xer VIII]] that referred to [[Chandaar]], [[Cadinth/Legends|Cadinth]] and [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] of the Kingdom of Cron, and the still-independent [[Desevro/Legends|Desevro]] of the [[Livien League]]
*'''[[House of Cron]]''', a Tionese noble family
*'''[[King of Cron]]''', the ruler of the Kingdom of Cron
*'''[[Kingdom of Cron]]''', an ancient territory in the Tion Cluster

===Vehicles and vessels===
*'''[[Cronese harpice]]''', a model of [[Warship/Legends|warship]] used by [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]]
*'''[[Cronian battlebird/Legends|Cronian battlebird]]''', a model of warship used by the [[King/Legends|King]] of Cron [[Ferece]]

===Miscellanea===
*'''[[Code of Cron]]''', a legal document

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|ja=クロン
}}
